package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for request_dto_contains_gorm_tags: Request DTOs that carry persistence-only `gorm` tags.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule140NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule140NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule140NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario140Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule140NegativeService, input Rule140NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
